issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: Find similar articles using stored embeddings
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses xata.db.articles.vectorSearch on the embedding column with size and a filter excluding the source id as documented; baseline reaches for pgvector SQL or a separate vector DB, missing Xata's built-in vectorSearch API.

scenarios.name: Build a RAG Q&A endpoint over the articles table
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses xata.db.articles.ask with searchType and rules as documented, returning answer plus source records; baseline manually wires search + an LLM call rather than using the built-in .ask() RAG method.
